AR1.justification: Claimed a write to observations.md in the actions log but no observations.md was produced on disk, so the routing intent was correct but the entry never landed — defensible neighboring outcome rather than a clean routing decision.

AR3.justification: No cross-references were written; nothing resolves incorrectly but no relative-path convention is demonstrated.

AR4.justification: No artifact was actually committed, so the workspace remains in its starting state and a re-run cannot conflict with prior history.
